EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IRing

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that identify a ring and define its behavior.

[Guid("592121AE-4CC8-11D1-834E-0000F8775BE9")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRing : IPath, ICurve, IGeometry

bool IsClosed { get; }

Property Value

bool

IsEmpty 

bool IsEmpty { get; }

Property Value

bool

IsExterior

Indicates if this ring can function as the exterior ring in a polygon (ring orientation is clockwise, area > 0).

bool IsExterior { get; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

Close()

Makes sure that this ring is closed by adding a line segment between the ring's 'to' and 'from' points if necessary.

void Close()

fromDistance double
toDistance double
asRatio bool
outSubcurve ICurve

GetSubcurveEx(double, double, bool, bool, bool)

Extracts a portion of this curve into a new curve. The interior of the new curve may contain the from/to point of the ring when useRingOrientation is true.

ICurve GetSubcurveEx(double fromDistance, double toDistance, bool asRatio, bool isCCW, bool useRingOrientation)

Parameters

fromDistance double
toDistance double
asRatio bool
isCCW bool
useRingOrientation bool

Returns

ICurve
